headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Close To Breaking On AI Fears, Trump; Oracle Earnings Late, SpaceX IPO On Launch Pad

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Surged on Strong Earnings and Improved Guidance
summary: Sands Capital Management, LLC released its Q1 2026 investor letter for its “Select Growth Strategy”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. Select Growth mainly targets leading U.S. businesses, driving positive structural changes. U.S. large-cap growth stocks fell in the first quarter.
